queries.question: Show all the research papers, also show the review articles that use the APA style for citations.
queries.sql:
SELECT Papers.Title 
FROM Papers
WHERE Papers.Academic_PaperType = "Research Paper" OR Papers.Academic_PaperType = "Review Article" AND Papers.Citation_Style = "APA"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?papers a :Research_Papers .
  ?papers p:Title ?title .
  ?papers p:Academic_PaperType ?academic_papertype_w .
  ?papers p:Academic_PaperType ?academic_papertype_w2 .
  ?papers p:Citation_Style ?citation_style_w .
  FILTER((STR(?academic_papertype_w) = "Research Paper" || (STR(?academic_papertype_w2) = "Review Article" && STR(?citation_style_w) = "APA")))
}

queries.question: Show both the research papers and review articles where either use the APA citation style.
queries.sql:
SELECT Papers.Title 
FROM Papers
WHERE (Papers.Academic_PaperType = "Research Paper" OR Papers.Academic_PaperType = "Review Article") AND Papers.Citation_Style = "APA"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?papers a :Research_Papers .
  ?papers p:Title ?title .
  ?papers p:Academic_PaperType ?academic_papertype_w .
  ?papers p:Academic_PaperType ?academic_papertype_w2 .
  ?papers p:Citation_Style ?citation_style_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?academic_papertype_w) = "Research Paper" || STR(?academic_papertype_w2) = "Review Article")) && STR(?citation_style_w) = "APA"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Please show all research papers and review articles using the APA citation style.
